creator: bf2006a@yahoo.com
text:
The xorg update has come and gone, so in the absence
of any specific information as to problems with this
update (several people report that it works), there
doesn't seem to be any reason for not committing what
is after all essentially a bugfix release update.  The
maintainer of this port still hasn't responded to my
email on updating the port from March 5, and this
update has been pending since Feb. 26.  If interest in
maintaining this port has lapsed, I'm willing to do
it.

bf
